name: Wand (Python Bindings for ImageMagick)

auth.notes: Local library; ImageMagick must be installed

performance.notes: ImageMagick ctypes bindings; slower than Pillow for simple ops; better for complex effects

agent_readiness.notes: Python ctypes bindings for ImageMagick — 200+ image formats. from wand.image import Image. with Image(filename='photo.jpg') as img: img.resize(800, 600). img.rotate(90). img.format = 'png'. img.save(filename='out.png'). img.fx('grayscale'). img.liquid_rescale(200, 200). img.morphology('Erode', 'Square:1'). PDF to images: Image(filename='doc.pdf', resolution=150). HEIC/WebP support via ImageMagick. Color profiles, ICC. Watermarking. Drawing: from wand.drawing import Drawing.

gotchas: Requires ImageMagick system library installed (brew install imagemagick)
ImageMagick security policy may block PDF conversion by default
Slower than Pillow for basic resize/convert operations
ImageMagick version compatibility issues between platforms
Memory usage can be high for large image operations
best_when: PDF-to-image conversion (Pillow cannot read PDFs natively)
Complex image effects unavailable in Pillow (liquid rescale, morphology)
200+ format support including RAW camera formats
avoid_when: Simple image resize/crop/save (use Pillow — faster and simpler)
When Pillow covers the use case (lighter dependency)
summary: Wand provides ctypes bindings for ImageMagick — 200+ image formats including HEIC, WebP, PDF, RAW. Image(filename='doc.pdf').resize(800,600).save(filename='out.png'). Complex effects: liquid rescale, morphology, fx. MIT. Requires ImageMagick system install. Slower than Pillow for simple ops. Best when PDF-to-image conversion, HEIC support, or ImageMagick-specific effects are needed. Use Pillow for standard image processing.
